name: big-break
description: Big Break — an LLM-friendly content-pack engine for generating, validating, and running replayable narrative (swipe-roguelike) games; ships a music-career game and a villa game on one genre-agnostic core.

scripts.test:ui: npm run build && node test/ui/smoke.mjs && node test/ui/crowding.mjs && node test/ui/mobile-matrix.mjs && node test/ui/creategame.mjs
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run typecheck && eslint . && node tools/check-engine-neutrality.mjs && node tools/validate-packs.mjs && node tools/lint-content.mjs && node tools/simulate.mjs --check && node test/ui/smoke.mjs && node test/ui/crowding.mjs && node test/ui/mobile-matrix.mjs && node test/ui/creategame.mjs
